Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Look up David Chen, Mina Hashimoto, and Catalina Dubois in contacts (queries: David Chen, Mina Hashimoto, Catalina Dubois) to confirm david.chen@moveops.com, mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, catalina.dubois@moveops.com if the environment needs it. Resolve CRM company records for Vectral Systems, NorthWind Technologies, and Terraform Digital / Vantage Distributed (CRM search: Vectral, NorthWind, Terraform, Vantage). Resolve the Slack channel id for #customer-engagement (list or search channels for customer-engagement).
2. Vectral (Mina, Rachel Whitfield): find current deals (renewal-at-risk, Q2, April wave; search deals by company Vectral or deal name containing Vectral), recent CRM engagements about renewal friction, stipends, pilot-era issues, and contacts such as Rachel Whitfield. Tool: crm_* (companies, deals, engagements, contacts).
3. Vectral in Airtable: find active or recent relocations and stipend rows for Vectral and named employees (e.g. Kevin Tran, Danielle Osei, April wave names) so client-facing narrative matches tables. Tool: airtable_* (query: Vectral Systems; refine with relocatee names from CRM if needed).
4. NorthWind (Catalina, Pam Kowalski, Denver satellite): find company/lead, deals, engagements about recovery, Denver moves, Pam Kowalski. Tool: crm_* (queries: NorthWind, Pam Kowalski, Kowalski).
5. NorthWind in Airtable: find in-flight relocations and any stipend records tied to NorthWind or Denver satellite context (NorthWind has no stipend arrangement in the universe, so stipend search expected to return nothing). Tool: airtable_* (queries: NorthWind, NorthWind Technologies, Denver as applicable).
6. Terraform Digital (Mina, Rachel Nguyen): find company record, Q2 batch deal, engagements about reply-all pricing, Rachel Nguyen. Tools: crm_*; contacts_* (queries: Rachel Nguyen, terraformdigital).
7. Terraform in Airtable and email: find batch relocation records and stipend records (client account shows $2,000/mo stipend fee but no individual stipend transaction rows expected); skim email for billing or commercial terms vs ops reality. Tools: airtable_* (Terraform, Vantage, worker names from deal); search_emails (queries: Terraform, Rachel Nguyen, Vantage, pricing, reply).
8. Slack and email triangulation for all three accounts: search Slack (#customer-engagement, #operations, #finance as needed) with terms like Vectral, NorthWind, Terraform, Rachel Whitfield, Pam Kowalski, Rachel Nguyen; search email with the same to catch contradictions vs CRM/Airtable. Tools: conversations_search_messages (non-empty search_query per call) / conversations_history (channel_id required, no query param — retrieves full channel messages); search_emails.
9. Linear read only: list or get issues still relevant to pilot remediation (ExpenseBot, expense auto-categorizer, stipend pilot) and/or vendor disputes (e.g. Heartland Q1, HM-2026-Q1, invoice reconciliation) that could surface on a client call for Vectral or related accounts; flag for AMs in CRM text only. Tools: linear_list_issues, linear_get_issue, or equivalents (search terms: ExpenseBot, pilot, Vectral, Heartland, invoice reconciliation, HM-2026-Q1 as needed). Do not call linear_create_comment, linear_create_issue, linear_update_issue.
10. Synthesize per account: for each company note what tools verified, what the AM must not promise yet, follow-ups the AM owns with client or ops; mention Hana/Marcus/finance handoffs only if the email trail already shows finance (flag, do not approve).
11. Write three CRM engagements via crm_create_engagement (or equivalent): one each tied to Vectral Systems, NorthWind Technologies, Terraform Digital / correct Terraform client company id. CE voice: coordination and next steps; no invented facts; say when something was not found in tools.
12. Post the same summary bullets to #customer-engagement via conversations_add_message (use resolved channel id).
13. send_email from david.chen@moveops.com to mina.hashimoto@moveops.com: prep for Vectral and Terraform (confirm, defer, ping Chloe Vance for coordination; Hana Kim or Marcus Thorne only if finance already appears in the trail).
14. send_email from david.chen@moveops.com to catalina.dubois@moveops.com: prep for NorthWind (Pam, Denver, recovery); confirm/defer guidance, ping Chloe Vance for coordination; Hana Kim or Marcus Thorne only if finance already appears in the trail.
15. send_email from david.chen@moveops.com to david.chen@moveops.com: short check-in note for all three accounts, what David should listen for in AM updates, and any gaps not verifiable from tools.
16. Do not do: mutate Linear issues; send executive briefings outside this scope; run QuickBooks reconciliation or bookings as CE.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

8 The Vectral Systems CRM engagement body (visible in crm_create_engagement parameters) mentions the Q3 2026 contract renewal being at risk or Rachel Whitfield's discount demand (e.g., references a 15% discount demand, renewal friction, churn threat, at-risk status, or similar).

30 When calling linear_list_issues (or similar), the model must pass a query related to 'pilot' or 'ExpenseBot' or 'expense' or 'Heartland' or 'vendor' or 'invoice' or 'remediation' (or similar terms targeting pilot remediation or vendor disputes).
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓—✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called linear_list_issues with query 'pilot expense stipend' — directly targeting pilot remediation and expense-related engineering issues. An earlier call with query 'Vectral' also targeted the account-specific pilot config issue.
✓Run #2The agent issued linear_list_issues calls with queries: 'stipend', 'vendor', and 'pilot' — all directly relevant to pilot remediation and vendor disputes as specified in the criterion.
